Module com.example.miniproyectosudoku6x6
Package com.example.miniproyectosudoku6x6.view

Class FabricaEstilos

java.lang.Object
com.example.miniproyectosudoku6x6.view.FabricaEstilos
public final class FabricaEstilos extends Object
Utility class that centralizes every CSS style manipulation performed on the Sudoku view components.

By concentrating style management in a single place, the controller stays focused on coordinating model and view, while the view layer owns all the cosmetic details. This improves the cohesion of both layers and reduces duplication of magic strings (CSS class names) across the project.

All methods are static because this class holds no state: it only exposes pure visual operations on JavaFX components.

This class belongs to the view layer of the MVC architecture.

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    static final String
    CLASE_BORDE_DERECHO
    CSS class applied to the right edge of a 2x3 block.
    static final String
    CLASE_BORDE_INFERIOR
    CSS class applied to the bottom edge of a 2x3 block.
    static final String
    CLASE_BORDE_INFERIOR_DERECHO
    CSS class applied to the inner corner of two adjacent block edges.
    static final String
    CLASE_CELDA_ERROR
    CSS class applied to a cell that violates a Sudoku rule.
    static final String
    CLASE_CELDA_FIJA
    CSS class applied to a fixed (clue) cell.
    static final String
    CLASE_CELDA_SUGERENCIA
    CSS class applied to a cell while it is being highlighted as a hint.
    static final String
    CLASE_ESTADO_ERROR
    CSS class that styles the status label as an error message.
    static final String
    CLASE_ESTADO_EXITO
    CSS class that styles the status label as a success message.

  • Constructor Details

    • FabricaEstilos

      private FabricaEstilos()
      Private constructor to prevent instantiation. This is a utility class with only static members.

  • Method Details

    • aplicarEstiloCeldaFija

      public static void aplicarEstiloCeldaFija(javafx.scene.control.TextField campo)
      Applies the "fixed cell" visual style to the given text field. Fixed cells are highlighted to show the player they are clues that cannot be modified.
      Parameters:
      campo - the text field representing the fixed cell

    • quitarEstiloCeldaFija

      public static void quitarEstiloCeldaFija(javafx.scene.control.TextField campo)
      Removes the "fixed cell" visual style from the given text field.
      Parameters:
      campo - the text field to update

    • aplicarEstiloError

      public static void aplicarEstiloError(javafx.scene.control.TextField campo, boolean tieneError)
      Toggles the error style on the given text field. When the cell is in an error state, the text field gets a red border; otherwise the error style is removed.
      Parameters:
      campo - the text field to update
      tieneError - true to mark the cell as invalid, false to clear the error style

    • aplicarEstiloSugerencia

      public static void aplicarEstiloSugerencia(javafx.scene.control.TextField campo)
      Applies the "hint suggestion" visual style to a cell, highlighting it in orange. Used by the help feature.
      Parameters:
      campo - the text field to highlight

    • quitarEstiloSugerencia

      public static void quitarEstiloSugerencia(javafx.scene.control.TextField campo)
      Removes the "hint suggestion" visual style from a cell.
      Parameters:
      campo - the text field to update

    • aplicarBordesBloque

      public static void aplicarBordesBloque(javafx.scene.control.TextField campo, boolean bordeDerecho, boolean bordeInferior)
      Applies the appropriate block-border style to a cell based on its position within the 6x6 grid. Cells located on the right edge of a 2x3 block get a thick right border; cells on the bottom edge get a thick bottom border; cells on both edges get both.
      Parameters:
      campo - the text field to style
      bordeDerecho - true if the cell is on a block's right edge
      bordeInferior - true if the cell is on a block's bottom edge

    • aplicarEstadoExito

      public static void aplicarEstadoExito(javafx.scene.control.Label etiqueta)
      Applies the success style to the status label and removes the error style if present. Used to give positive feedback to the player.
      Parameters:
      etiqueta - the status label to update

    • aplicarEstadoError

      public static void aplicarEstadoError(javafx.scene.control.Label etiqueta)
      Applies the error style to the status label and removes the success style if present. Used to alert the player about problems.
      Parameters:
      etiqueta - the status label to update

    • agregarClaseUnica

      private static void agregarClaseUnica(javafx.scene.control.TextField campo, String claseEstilo)
      Adds a CSS class to a JavaFX node only if it is not already present. This avoids duplicating the class in the styleClass list, which could trigger unintended visual side effects.
      Parameters:
      campo - the text field to update
      claseEstilo - the CSS class to add

    • agregarClaseUnica

      private static void agregarClaseUnica(javafx.scene.control.Label etiqueta, String claseEstilo)
      Adds a CSS class to a JavaFX label only if it is not already present.
      Parameters:
      etiqueta - the label to update
      claseEstilo - the CSS class to add
